title: Trump says strikes on Iran could take weeks as U.S. urges Americans to leave the region
author: Anthony Faiola, Susannah George, Amy B Wang, Leo Sands, Abbie Cheeseman, Mohamad  El Chamaa, Heba Farouk Mahfouz , Sammy Westfall
fullText: Six American service members have been killed. Trump doesn’t rule out ground troops to Iran if ‘necessary.’
summary: Six American service members have been killed. Trump doesn’t rule out ground troops to Iran if ‘necessary.’
